PostToolUse.name: email-template-check
PostToolUse.description: Remind about mail.template best practices when email template XML is written or edited

hooks.prompt:
[odoo-report] Email template file changed. Verify:
- mail.template record has body_html (not body)
- subject uses inline_template syntax: {{ object.name }}
- body_html uses QWeb: <t t-out="object.field"/>
- email_to or partner_to is set with dynamic expression
- For Odoo 17+: use report_template_ids (M2M) not report_template
- For Odoo 15+: use t-out (not t-esc)
- File is listed in __manifest__.py under 'data'

PostToolUse.name: qweb-report-check
PostToolUse.description: Remind about QWeb report structure when report XML is written or edited

hooks.prompt:
[odoo-report] QWeb report file changed. Verify:
- ir.actions.report has report_type="qweb-pdf" and report_name matching template id
- Template uses t-call="web.html_container" as outermost wrapper
- Then t-call="web.external_layout" for header/footer and UTF-8 encoding
- Content inside <div class="page">
- Currency uses t-options='{"widget": "monetary"}'
- Page breaks: <div style="page-break-before: always;"/>
- For Arabic/RTL: web.html_container is MANDATORY for UTF-8
